revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-380

A high pressure mercury lamp in which the light is produced partly by the mercury vapour and partly by a layer of fluorescent material excited by the ultra-violet radiation of the discharge .

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
